text: Hotfix - SelfTest no longer displays 0420 fault.
subpoints: The last update broke the SelfTest system, which would report an immediate failure if the notification was still processing.

text: The SelfTest has been restyled during the fix.
subpoints: As it has been out of date for a while, I changed the backgrounds, colours, and emojis to represent SpeakThat's current styling.
